narrative:
Precinct Bettsville Village (precinct in Seneca County) has 393 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a clear Republican lean of 9.7 percentage points.
